reasoning: Article 32 of GDPR focuses on the security of processing, which includes encryption, access control, and ensuring data integrity and confidentiality. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that secrets and etcd data are encrypted at rest, audit logging is enabled to track access and changes, and network policies are in place to restrict unauthorized access. These controls align with the requirements of ensuring data security and integrity as outlined in GDPR.
title: Article 32 Security of processing
